title: QWORK® 4 Rolls Plastic Dust Sheet, 2.4M x 20M Masking Film with Self-AdhesiveTape, for Painting, Decorating, Furniture Covering
features: Made from tear-resistant PE plastic, ensuring effective dust, water, and grease protection.
Each roll measures 2.4m x 20m, providing large coverage across 4 rolls.
Features easy-fix self-adhesive masking tape, preventing residue and ensuring secure application.
Tear the interface of the positioning sticker and the plastic film at the same time to avoid separation of the plastic film and the positioning sticker.
Ideal for protecting floors, walls, furniture, carpets, ceilings, and more during painting and decorating projects.
description: Product Description About Qwork Save more, get more No ads, just low prices and good stuff. We keep it simple and make sure you get the best for less. Choose Qwork, where your money works harder for you.
